scripts.generate: npm run generate:did && npm run generate:declarations
scripts.generate:declarations: mkdir -p lib/motoko/src/declarations && bash -eo pipefail -c "didc bind candid/evm_rpc.did -t mo | awk '/public type Self = .* -> async actor \\{/ { sub(/-> async actor \\{.*/, \"-> async Service;\"); print; print \"  public type Service = actor {\"; next } { print }' > lib/motoko/src/declarations/evm_rpc.mo"
